message:
test(wave-59): derive trait coverage for ReplayMode, Breakpoint, DiagnosticConfig, Resolution, etc.

8 new tests: replayer (ReplayMode, Breakpoint), divergence
(DiagnosticConfig, AffectedEntities), typed_symbol
(SerializationFormat), graded (Resolution, ResolvedProof, ScopeProof).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
